episode_level_fixed_harmed_switches.detail: eval_final_selection groups by (seed, episode); selected_rows length equals switches and fixed/harmed are counted once per switched episode.

loso_train_eval_separation.detail: Held seed is excluded from training data and threshold selection. Fixed gate is reused from splitA/splitB precomputed gate rows, not learned from held labels in the LOSO run. Original legacy normalization used all feature rows and is deprecated; corrected run uses train-only normalization.

calibrated_topk_nearmiss_order.detail: rank_metrics orders by np.argsort(-scores), and near_miss checks labels[order[0]], so calibrated top-k/near-miss use calibrated order.

legacy_vs_full_definition.detail: legacy_rank_combined is ranking/listwise/preserve without BCE; full_bce_pairwise_listwise_preserve is BCE plus pairwise/listwise/preserve. They must not be merged in text.

budget_feature_normalization.detail: Budget generalization uses the same feature definitions and train-only normalization in its legacy fitter. n50 has no matching fixed gate grid, so deployment comparison is unavailable. Earlier old full/cost_calibration_v2 ranking variants used all-X normalization and are deprecated for strict deployment claims.

deprecated_numbers.pac_moda_v2_full_n100_20260529 legacy_ra: deprecated due to all-X normalization leakage in fit_combined_ranker
deprecated_numbers.cost_calibration_v2_n100_20260529 pairwi: deprecated for strict split claims due to all-X normalization in ranking fitters; BCE remains train-normalized

main_result_valid: corrected legacy/rank-preserve PAC-MoDA v2 OOF fixed=6, harmed=0, switches=8, stateroll-only recovered=6
